assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
=You are a music expert. Based on a group of {{ $json.players.length }} players with different tastes, recommend exactly 50 songs that would be perfect for a blindtest game that everyone will enjoy.

PLAYERS INFORMATION:
{{ $json.players.map((player, i) => `Player ${i+1}: ${player.name}
- Age: ${player.age}
- Genres: ${player.genres.join(", ")}
- Notes: ${player.specialPhrase || "None"}`).join("\n\n") }}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Create a diverse playlist that appeals to all age groups ({{ Math.min(...$json.players.map(p => p.age)) }}-{{ Math.max(...$json.players.map(p => p.age)) }} years)
- Include songs from ALL mentioned genres: {{ [...new Set($json.players.flatMap(p => p.genres))].join(", ") }}
- Balance the distribution so everyone finds songs they like
- Prioritize popular, recognizable songs perfect for a blindtest
- Shuffle songs so that all are mixed
- Make sure all songs are available on Spotify

RESPOND WITH ONLY VALID JSON in this exact format, with no markdown code blocks or explanations:
[
  {"artist": "Artist Name", "song": "Song Title"},
  {"artist": "Artist Name", "song": "Song Title"},
  {"artist": "Artist Name", "song": "Song Title"},
  ... (50 songs total)
]

No markdown formatting, just pure JSON.
